items.title: Vatican Bank makes first foray into equity indexes, setting stage for potential ETF launches
items.description: The Holy See-linked bank debuted two indexes tracking 50 stocks that it said align with Catholic teachings, marking a push into retail investment prod...

items.title: Alphabet boosts debt sale again as total raise exceeds $30 billion, sources say
items.description: Alphabet again boosted the size of its bond sale as the internet giant prepares to accelerate its AI buildout.

items.title: Bitcoin plunge: Bitwise CIO cites 'the four-year cycle' as No. 1 reason for losses

items.title: Michael Saylor downplays Strategy credit risk as bitcoin tumbles: 'We'll refinance the debt'
items.description: Strategy plans to continue refinancing its debt and buying bitcoin, even as the token tumbles, CEO Michael Saylor said Tuesday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
